title: Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud is the King of Saudi Arabia, a position he has held since 2015.

title: King Faisal bin Abdulaziz Al Saud becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Faisal bin Abdulaziz Al Saud was King of Saudi Arabia from 1964 until his assassination in 1975.

title: Ibn Saud becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Abdulaziz bin Abdul Rahman Al Saud ;, known in the Western world as Ibn Saud, was a Najdi statesman and religious leader who became the founder and first king of Saudi Arabia, reigning from 23 September 1932 until his death in 1953.

title: Abdullah of Saudi Arabia becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Abdullah bin Abdulaziz Al Saud was King and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia from 1 August 2005 until his death in 2015.

title: Fahd bin Abdulaziz Al Saud becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Fahd bin Abdulaziz Al Saud was King and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia from 13 June 1982 until his death in 2005.

title: Saud of Saudi Arabia becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Saud bin Abdulaziz Al Saud was King of Saudi Arabia from 9 November 1953 until his abdication on 2 November 1964.

title: Khalid of Saudi Arabia becomes King of Saudi Arabia
fact: Khalid bin Abdulaziz Al Saud was King and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia from 25 March 1975 until his death in 1982.
